creator: castilloeduardo@outlook.com.ar
text:
this program as well as cqrlog are essential for
the world community of amateur radio

many amateur radios are thinking of migrating from linux
to freebsd when finding wsjtz and cqrlog in the repositories

since wsjtz is not in any linux distribution

I am very pleased to be able to have this soft in freebsd

In Argentina, the use of freebsd began to be seen in
radio clubs, which helps to spread this system
